title: VINTERFINT Artificial flower, in/outdoor Amaryllis/red, 60 cm
features: Brightens up and spreads a warm feeling in your home, wherever you choose to place it.
Just as beautiful on its own in a vase as in a flower arrangement, and putting several together creates a lovely eye-catcher that impresses your guests.
Lifelike artificial flower that remains just as fresh-looking and beautiful year after year.
Available in red and white – choose the colour you like best or mix and match.
You can bend and adjust the twig any way you like thanks to the steel wire in the stem.
description: Enjoy the beauty of a blooming amaryllis during the season's festivities – or all year round. So elegant and fresh that it’s hard to believe that the flower is artificial.
